records.question: Which documents with receipt number 189 and other details exactly x have a status of currently working on and a receipt date on or after 1996-07-27 03:30:40?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
WHERE ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'currently working on' AND documents.receipt_date >= '1996-07-27 03:30:40' AND documents.receipt_number = '189' AND documents.other_details = 'x'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.document_id FROM Documents AS T1 INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Status AS T2 ON T1.document_status_code = T2.document_status_code WHERE T1.receipt_date >= '1996-07-27 03:30:40' AND T1.receipt_number = '189' AND T1.other_details = 'x' AND T2.document_status_description = 'currently working on'

records.question: Which documents have receipt number 124 and receipt date 1999-04-17 14:19:32, are currently working on status, have other details as b, were mailed on or before 1971-11-03 12:32:14, and were handled by Fedex with shipping agent description k?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
JOIN documents_mailed ON documents.document_id = documents_mailed.document_id
WHERE ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'Fedex' AND documents.other_details = 'b' AND ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'currently working on' AND documents_mailed.mailing_date <= '1971-11-03 12:32:14' AND documents.receipt_number = '124' AND documents.receipt_date = '1999-04-17 14:19:32' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'k'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.document_id FROM Documents AS T1 INNER JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents AS T2 ON T1.shipping_agent_code = T2.shipping_agent_code INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Status AS T3 ON T1.document_status_code = T3.document_status_code INNER JOIN Documents_Mailed AS T4 ON T1.document_id = T4.document_id WHERE T1.other_details = 'b' AND T1.receipt_number = '124' AND T1.receipt_date = '1999-04-17 14:19:32' AND T2.shipping_agent_name = 'Fedex' AND T2.shipping_agent_description = 'k' AND T3.document_status_description = 'currently working on' AND T4.mailing_date <= '1971-11-03 12:32:14'

records.question: Which documents with a document_type_description of u were received on or after 1973-11-05 21:48:53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE documents.receipt_date >= '1973-11-05 21:48:53' AND ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'u'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.document_id FROM Documents AS T1 INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types AS T2 ON T1.document_type_code = T2.document_type_code WHERE T1.receipt_date >= '1973-11-05 21:48:53' AND T2.document_type_description = 'u'

records.question: Which documents have a type description of b, are handled by UPS with a shipping agent description of g, include other details exactly as z, and have draft details exactly as k?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
JOIN document_drafts ON documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'b' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'g' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'UPS' AND documents.other_details = 'z' AND document_drafts.draft_details = 'k'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.document_id FROM Documents AS T1 INNER JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents AS T2 ON T1.shipping_agent_code = T2.shipping_agent_code INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types AS T3 ON T1.document_type_code = T3.document_type_code INNER JOIN Document_Drafts AS T4 ON T1.document_id = T4.document_id WHERE T1.other_details = 'z' AND T2.shipping_agent_description = 'g' AND T2.shipping_agent_name = 'UPS' AND T3.document_type_description = 'b' AND T4.draft_details = 'k'

records.question: What documents have a type that is exactly u and were handled by the shipping agent described as g?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'u' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'g'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.document_id FROM Documents AS T1 INNER JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents AS T2 ON T1.shipping_agent_code = T2.shipping_agent_code INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types AS T3 ON T1.document_type_code = T3.document_type_code WHERE T2.shipping_agent_description = 'g' AND T3.document_type_description = 'u'

records.question: Which documents with a document type of f and shipping agent k have a receipt number of 114, other details of j, and a receipt date on or before 2005-09-30 00:10:02?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_types ON documents.document_type_code = ref_document_types.document_type_code
WHERE ref_document_types.document_type_description = 'f' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'k' AND documents.receipt_date <= '2005-09-30 00:10:02' AND documents.receipt_number = '114' AND documents.other_details = 'j'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.document_id FROM Documents AS T1 INNER JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents AS T2 ON T1.shipping_agent_code = T2.shipping_agent_code INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Types AS T3 ON T1.document_type_code = T3.document_type_code WHERE T1.receipt_date <= '2005-09-30 00:10:02' AND T1.receipt_number = '114' AND T1.other_details = 'j' AND T2.shipping_agent_description = 'k' AND T3.document_type_description = 'f'

records.question: Which documents were handled by the shipping agent USPS and have associated drafts?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
JOIN document_drafts ON documents.document_id = document_drafts.document_id
WHERE ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS'
records.pred_sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.document_id FROM Documents AS T1 INNER JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents AS T2 ON T1.shipping_agent_code = T2.shipping_agent_code INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Status AS T3 ON T1.document_status_code = T3.document_status_code INNER JOIN Document_Drafts AS T4 ON T1.document_id = T4.document_id WHERE T2.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS'

records.question: Which documents with receipt number 80 and other details exactly q were mailed using USPS with description q on or after 1973-11-05 21:48:53?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT documents.document_id FROM documents
JOIN ref_shipping_agents ON documents.shipping_agent_code = ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_code
JOIN ref_document_status ON documents.document_status_code = ref_document_status.document_status_code
WHERE ref_document_status.document_status_description = 'mailed' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS' AND ref_shipping_agents.shipping_agent_description = 'q' AND documents.receipt_number = '80' AND documents.receipt_date >= '1973-11-05 21:48:53' AND documents.other_details = 'q'
records.pred_sql: SELECT T1.document_id FROM Documents AS T1 INNER JOIN Ref_Shipping_Agents AS T2 ON T1.shipping_agent_code = T2.shipping_agent_code INNER JOIN Ref_Document_Status AS T3 ON T1.document_status_code = T3.document_status_code WHERE T1.receipt_number = '80' AND T1.receipt_date >= '1973-11-05 21:48:53' AND T1.other_details = 'q' AND T2.shipping_agent_name = 'USPS' AND T2.shipping_agent_description = 'q' AND T3.document_status_description = 'mailed'
